title: Diabetic Individuals with Bleeding Gums: 10 Herbal Teas to Try
description: Sanguisorba officinalis teas have been traditionally used to help with bleeding gums due to their anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. The tea contains flavonoids, particularly quercetin, and tannins, which help to reduce swelling and bleeding in the gums. The astringent properties of the tea also help to tighten the blood vessels, thereby reducing the flow of blood and promoting healing.
